Penalize vague template filler, generic analogies unrelated to the subject, unsupported claims, missing actionable details, and responses that merely restate broad subject areas.
evaluation_steps: Check if the Input provides concrete, domain-specific teaching or dialogue.
Assess whether the Actual Output addresses the Input with actionable details and relevance to the target concept.
Evaluate the Context for any missing information that could support the Actual Output's usefulness in supervised fine-tuning.
Penalize responses that are vague, generic, or unrelated to the subject matter.
